title: Tilray Brands Marks Seven Years of Cannabis Legalization with #1 Market Position in Canada
text: Tilray Brands marked seven years of cannabis legalization in Canada with the #1 market-leading position by revenue. The company has emerged as the most robust and leading international cannabis licensed producer with cannabis market share of approximately 13.4%, achieved through strategic acquisitions including Broken Coast in 2018, the business combination with Aphria in 2021, and the acquisition of HEXO Corp. Tilray's licensed producers including Aphria, Broken Coast, Hexo, Redecan, and other market-leading brands have consistently led at the forefront of Canada's cannabis industry. The company expanded its leading cannabis market share position with pro-forma cannabis market share increasing by 467 basis points to approximately 13%, becoming #1 in Flower with 40% market share, #1 in Oils and Concentrates, and #2 in Pre-Rolls with 29% market share.
